figura.docs.silly.set_fly:
Allows overriding if you can fly or not.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.set_pos:
Sets your player's position.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.set_velocity:
Sets your player's velocity.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.set_rot:
Sets your player's rotation.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.set_noclip:
Sets if your player should act like a spectator.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.cheats_enabled: Returns if cheats are presently enabled.
figura.docs.silly.upload_avatar: Uploads your current avatar to cloud.
figura.docs.silly.load_local_avatar: Loads an avatar from your avatar folder.
figura.docs.silly.get_avatar_nameplate: Returns the nameplates of another avatar.
figura.docs.silly.cat: Sends meow in chat, because half of figura are cats in disguise.
figura.docs.silly.set_block:
Sets a fake block in the world.
Setting a block to nil removes the fake one.
Requires cheats (but runs on clients!)
figura.docs.silly.set_fake_blocks_enable:
Sets whether or not fake blocks are enabled locally.
Defaults to true.
figura.docs.silly.get_fake_block_info: Gets info about who placed a fake block at a position.
figura.docs.silly.set_hud_element_visibl: Sets the visibility of a hud element.
figura.docs.silly.get_version: Returns the current version of SillyPlugin.
figura.docs.silly.set_gravity:
Disables or enables gravity.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.set_friction:
Disables or enables friction.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.get_permissions: Gets the SillyPlugin permissions your avatar has.
figura.docs.silly.ping: Runs one of your avatars pings, even on local.
figura.docs.silly_backports:
Useful 0.1.6 features, backported.
Exists under the global "silly_backports".
Also see FOX's Misc Figura Backport!
figura.docs.silly_backports.add_script:
Takes a path to the script, the contents of the script, and what side the script should be added to.
If the contents are nil, then the script is removed from the avatar.
Side must be either "NBT", "RUNTIME", or "BOTH". If nil, it will default to "BOTH".
figura.docs.silly_backports.get_script:
Takes a path to the script and returns the contents of the script.
This is different from using avatar:getNBT since the NBT stores byte arrays instead of a string
figura.docs.silly_backports.get_scripts: Returns a table of all scripts in the avatar with the name as the index and the contents as the value. If a string is supplied then all scripts starting with the string will be returned
figura.docs.silly_backports.get_caller: Returns the UUID of the avatar that is calling your stored functions, or 'nil' if there is none (usually because you're not calling it from within a stored function)
